name: Health deploy marker and model catalog
description: GET /health reports the deployed commit; GET /api/v1/llm/providers lists the model catalog with exactly one default.

planSteps.description: Verify the response is 200 with JSON body where status equals 'ok' and commit is a non-empty string.
Verify the response is 200 and the providers list is non-empty, each entry has provider_id, display_name, model_name and configured fields, and exactly one entry has is_default set to true.
